Title: Toussaint, Manuel
Subject Area: architecture (object genre)|Colonial Latin American architecture styles|Colonial Latin American styles|Colonial Spanish American|colonialism|colonization|Latin American|sculpture (visual works)|Spanish (culture or style)
Overview: Early work on the history of colonial Spain; architectural history of Latin America; created the Institute for aesthetic reserach at the University of Mexico. (Laboratorio de Arte)
Selected Bibliography: Tasco. Mexico 1931.; Arte mudejar en America. Mexico.; La catedral y las iglesias de Puebla. Mexico, 1954.
